connectorUiConfig.title: D3 Smart SOAR Incidents
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The D3 Smart SOAR data connector pulls incidents from D3 Smart SOAR into Microsoft Sentinel using the D3 codeless REST API command endpoint.

sampleQueries.description: Get sample D3 Smart SOAR incidents

dataTypes.name: D3SOARIncidents_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery: D3SOARIncidents_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(12h) | summarize Time=max(TimeGenerated) | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

instructionSteps.title: Connect D3 Smart SOAR to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description:
Enter your D3 Smart SOAR connection details below. Incidents will be polled every 5 minutes and written to the **D3SOARIncidents_CL** table.

**Server URL** — The base URL of your D3 Smart SOAR deployment, up to and including the site path. Do not include the API path.

**Username** — Your D3 Smart SOAR account username (same as your portal login).

**Site** — The D3 Smart SOAR site name your account belongs to (e.g. `Security Operations`).

**D3 JWT** — A JSON Web Token issued by D3 Smart SOAR for API authentication.
